faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer:
The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field. 
Helpful Link: Mechanical Engineering Subjects in Detail

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

student_insights.feedback: Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology programmes is around INR 60,000 to 5,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Please don't waste your time and money in this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very poor. Only 1 and 2 students get placements from the whole batch. The highest package is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA, which is low.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has no paint and a dead building. Our college is not value for money. Building needs maintenance and projectors are broken. Hostels are too expensive and they don't match the value. Courses like BBA and B.Com they treated the same, which is odd because all the subjects and classes are the same in both courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Super infrastructure and lackluster student life experience.

review_content.Placements: In 2023, 23 out of 38 M.Tech students got placed, with a median package of 4.50 LPA. More than 92% of students are placed. More than 90% get internships. Placements are also average. Only some students get higher packages. Most of the students secure a package of 4 - 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are adequate facilities such as classrooms, libraries, laboratories, sports facilities, medical rooms, sanitation facilities, and computer labs. They are essential for creating a conducive learning environment. A qualified teacher has the right academic qualifications and training to teach effectively.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Baddi University is one of the best colleges for all.

review_content.Placements: I college is one of the best colleges for placement. It gives 100% placement for all the students. Recently, one of the pharma companies visited for placement, and more than 30 students got placed in that company (Macloids) with an 18 LPA package. Many more companies will be visiting for recruitment for students, and the best part of our college is its campus, which is so beautiful.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is one of the better places to stay because it's inside the college campus, and the quality of food is good. There is a gym too for the girls, and the main thing is the security of the hostel, which is very high for students. In our hostel, there is zero ragging, and it gives a home vibe.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall good and calm campus life.

review_content.Placements: Out of 60 students, 55 students got placed. The lowest average package is 1.5 LPA, and the highest average package is 2.36 LPA. Macleods, Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Torex are the top recruiting companies. Almost everyone got an internship at Sun Pharma and Macleods in Production, QA, and QC.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is quiet and good, open all the time for the students. In the hostel, rooms are good, but the food is not up to the mark. Canteen facilities in the college are really good. Medical facilities in the hostel are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A real review of our college.

review_content.Placements: Students with above 75% get placements. The average salary package offered is about 2.5 LPA. Companies required boys for the packaging department. In our course, internships are not on the academic calendar. Placements are available in every course whether it's B.Pharmacy or MBA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Working laboratories are available in the college. Classrooms are fully managed. Our college also provides us with free Wi-Fi facilities. Food quality is average. A library is also available in our college. A lot of sports activities are available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review from 2k24.

review_content.Placements: Out of 10 students, 6-7 students get placed in secure jobs or, must I say, crack positions in great companies. The highest package is up to 3 crore per annum, and the lowest is up to 8 lakhs per annum. Companies include Gel-Mark, Med-Life, Mankind Pharma, and many more. Top offered courses are B. Pharmacy, B.Tech (in various fields), B.Sc. Agriculture, B.Sc. Nursing, B.Sc. with all subjects and programs, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The School of Pharmacy has the best facilities available in our university. All faculty members have a great command of their own subjects. They help us to clear our concepts. They are very supportive and helpful. Our whole campus has Wi-Fi connections. We have library access all the time. The library has all kinds of books and a cozy reading space. I would like to say that hostel life here could improve. Restrictions on girls should be considered once. Food in the hostel mess is average and needs to be improved. The canteen is good and maintains hygiene. They have good medical assistance. They provide good first aid if needed.

admission_overview.college_name: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CAT for admission to specific courses.Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technologyoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 54 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,08,000 - 5,60,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 60,000 - 4,00,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Boys’ hostels are located at a short convenient distance from the campus
Both the hostels have facilities for outdoor games like badminton, volleyball and cricket                  
Rooms available on single, double, and triple sharing basis

library.description: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology's central library with rich collection of books, periodicals, back volumes of journals and CDs/DVDs, online access of e-resources along with library in each constituent college.The library has installed Open Source Software (OSS), KOHA library Management Solution & other software like Dspace/Greenstone for automation and digitization of its services.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court

library.description: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology's central library with rich collection of books, periodicals, back volumes of journals and CDs/DVDs, online access of e-resources along with library in each constituent college.The library has installed Open Source Software (OSS), KOHA library Management Solution & other software like Dspace/Greenstone for automation and digitization of its services.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Please don't waste your time and money in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has no paint and a dead building. Our college is not value for money. Building needs maintenance and projectors are broken. Hostels are too expensive and they don't match the value. Courses like BBA and B.Com they treated the same, which is odd because all the subjects and classes are the same in both courses.

reviews.review_heading: Super infrastructure and lackluster student life experience.
reviews.review_text: There are adequate facilities such as classrooms, libraries, laboratories, sports facilities, medical rooms, sanitation facilities, and computer labs. They are essential for creating a conducive learning environment. A qualified teacher has the right academic qualifications and training to teach effectively.

reviews.review_heading: Baddi University is one of the best colleges for all.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is one of the better places to stay because it's inside the college campus, and the quality of food is good. There is a gym too for the girls, and the main thing is the security of the hostel, which is very high for students. In our hostel, there is zero ragging, and it gives a home vibe.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good and calm campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is quiet and good, open all the time for the students. In the hostel, rooms are good, but the food is not up to the mark. Canteen facilities in the college are really good. Medical facilities in the hostel are not good.

reviews.review_heading: A real review of our college.
reviews.review_text: Working laboratories are available in the college. Classrooms are fully managed. Our college also provides us with free Wi-Fi facilities. Food quality is average. A library is also available in our college. A lot of sports activities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review from 2k24.
reviews.review_text: The School of Pharmacy has the best facilities available in our university. All faculty members have a great command of their own subjects. They help us to clear our concepts. They are very supportive and helpful. Our whole campus has Wi-Fi connections. We have library access all the time. The library has all kinds of books and a cozy reading space. I would like to say that hostel life here could improve. Restrictions on girls should be considered once. Food in the hostel mess is average and nee...

reviews.review_heading: This university has a really good campus.
reviews.review_text: The college also gives students access to every club, and the community here is good. They are well-behaved and educated. Fests at Baddi University are conducted about three times per semester, so students can also enjoy their lives. College also arranges extra fun events throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I had satisfactory facilities at this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an average infrastructure for the MBA. The college has good quality facilities in our course. The college has high-speed Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, canteen, etc., in their campus for its students. The college also has its own hostel for the students. Hostel facilities were also good like the college.

reviews.review_heading: M.Tech at Baddi University Of Emerging Sciences & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is spread across a vast area. The University covers acres of land and have many departmental buildings. For the Pharmacy course, for the engineering courses, for the Science courses and for the MBA. Also they have 4-5 Hostels within the Campus. Our Hostels are equipped with Wi-Fi so that we can study unlimited. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and they have large auditoriums for organizing Indoor events and large grounds for sports events. They have got many Univers...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university in all aspects. If you need a degree, do not bother about placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus was Wi-Fi enabled, but it was not working on top floors. Classrooms were good. The library needs to be a little updated as all books were outdated. The hostel life was somewhat struggling between 4 walls. The food served in the mess was not good. The hostel staff used to pass personal comments.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with bad quality of education and less placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college were good. Wi-Fi was available on campus. Classrooms were good. Computers in the labs were old and don't work. It was difficult to install a simple program on those computers. The library was good with all the books and study materials. Our college supported students for NPTEL certifications.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Baddi University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed was 2G bandwidth. Classrooms are like store rooms with no paint on walls and look like a cemetery. There is no cleanliness maintained until there's a complaint filed. Sweepers show their attitude while cleaning the room as if we intentionally made it dirty.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was enabled. The classes were updated and students get Wi-Fi on campus as well. The infrastructure was good, and it provides 25 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: BUEST is the best with you in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. There are venture labs for practical-based knowledge. The classrooms are well furnished and the library has every book related to management studies. BUEST gets 5 stars in every area. It is highly recommended and everyone can join BUEST.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi facilities. Computer labs and smart classrooms are available. Hostel facilities are good with the best quality food, sports facilities, medical facilities and a canteen within the campus.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology

likes.text: Reputed companies like IBM, Infosys, BookMyShow and even the small companies visit our college to offer placements.
Placements in our college were really good, and students get many opportunities as many good companies visited the campus.

likes.text: They provide Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library, a classroom, a canteen, etc, And they provide good quality food in the mess and canteen.
Our college provided students with all the essential amenities, such as a library, labs, classrooms, and Wi-Fi.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Every student must have good technical knowledge, and industrial exposure helps in enhancing their technical skills as well.
Teachers were very helpful, and they made the subject easy by giving lectures using the smart class facilities which helped the students in learning fast.

review_summary.college_name: IILM Institute for Business and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: We are proud to be a part of IILM.

content.Placements: The placements totally depend on the student’s knowledge. The college is fulfilling all the needs required. Many companies are interested in hiring from our campus. BlackRock and Apple are among the companies visiting for the placements drive. 100% students got summer internships from campus. There is no limit of the highest package here. The lowest package offered is around 5 to 10 Lacs. Managers to CEO, all the roles are offered by the companies with many CEOs emerging out from the campus every year.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in my campus, from Wi-Fi to projectors, everything is available in the campus. All the required labs are available and the canteen area is also good. Medical facility is provided for the students along with sports facilities. The library is well maintained having 10000 books availability along with an online library App which is a good initiative by IILM.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty members and good placements only in the marketing field.

content.Placements: The college provides an internship for students. Most of the placements offered are pool campus. If you are not bootlicking, your chances are less, but if you are focused, you can get opportunities. The major problem here was partiality among students. Fees are little on the higher side as compared to packages. Better options are available.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The college provides 3 hostels. One hostel is outstanding, which can accomodate 30 males students, other hostels were average. Food served at the canteen is very bad. The college provides Wi-Fi facility, labs and library. The ground is small, and only basketball court is available. You will manage to play cricket there.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of hostel and college is really good. Hostel room is 3 sharing, hostel has all the basic amenities like Wi-Fi. individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college with good placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Placements going on for the batch 2017-19 have been good till now. Around 5-7 companies have visited the campus, and almost 20 students have been placed with an average package of 6 LPA for now. Also, none of the companies has gone empty-handed from here. The students are trained in such a manner that they get selected in one of the top companies.
content.Infrastructure: I won't say it is a very lavish campus, but it provides you with a clean and green environment. It satisfies all your basic requirements. Living here is healthy. The classrooms are well-equipped with ACs, and to provide students with the ease of studying, projectors and LEDs have been set up.

hostel.description: Air conditioned hostel accommodation with round the clock security service is provided to students. apart from theses library facility and recreational areas with indoor games, PlayStation 3 is being provided.For off campus hostel cab facility is also available.

library.description: College has a well stocked library and a well-equipped information center.The library houses a rich collection of 15000 books which includes variegated material-from hard-core social and management science literature to applied socio-economic formulations, and relates both to theory articulation and skill development. Other than books,journals and other reading material are also available in the library.The institute also has institutional membership for online resources such as, DELNET,ICSSR, under MHRD,etc.

hostel.description: Air conditioned hostel accommodation with round the clock security service is provided to students. apart from theses library facility and recreational areas with indoor games, PlayStation 3 is being provided.For off campus hostel cab facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: We are proud to be a part of IILM.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in my campus, from Wi-Fi to projectors, everything is available in the campus. All the required labs are available and the canteen area is also good. Medical facility is provided for the students along with sports facilities. The library is well maintained having 10000 books availability along with an online library App which is a good initiative by IILM.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and good placements only in the marketing field.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The college provides 3 hostels. One hostel is outstanding, which can accomodate 30 males students, other hostels were average. Food served at the canteen is very bad. The college provides Wi-Fi facility, labs and library. The ground is small, and only basketball court is available. You will manage to play cricket there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel and college is really good. Hostel room is 3 sharing, hostel has all the basic amenities like Wi-Fi. Washing machine, microwave, and TV available in common Room of hostel. The hostel rooms are very spacious and furniture is also good. Library has all kind of books it includes course books, novels, business magazines etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. One really likes the campus after visiting.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good. The campus is lush green. The basketball court is huge. There are spacious classrooms. Lift facility is available here. Students are allowed to use the lift. In some colleges, students are not allowed to use the lift. But IILM also thinks about the comfort of everyone whether one is sick or well.

reviews.review_heading: The college with good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: I won't say it is a very lavish campus, but it provides you with a clean and green environment. It satisfies all your basic requirements. Living here is healthy. The classrooms are well-equipped with ACs, and to provide students with the ease of studying, projectors and LEDs have been set up.

reviews.review_heading: More than satisfied. Good placement and experience.
reviews.review_text: Clean and green campus with cool cafeteria. More than 10000+ books in library. Experienced faculty. Mentoring programme also run here. Industrial exposure is one of the best part here. No worries about security. 24 hrs running electricity and water. AC's room with best utilities.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities in the college are not as expected.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is at an average level. After becoming the university, they are still making lots of renovation inside the college. You can get very good, and you can find an ample number of books there. There are no medical facilities. The speed of Wi-Fi is good and still improving the doped and network range. The classrooms are average. Outdoors games (basketball only) Indoors games ( badminton, TT Carrom, PS4) are available. The gym is also available which is in average condition.

reviews.review_heading: Best IILM review with all the queries, which can occur in your mind.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are well-furnished and working efficiently, Gym got modified this year and had all the equipment inside it. We have internet facility to work, security 24/7. The medical facilities are also available, and we have a common medical room for all the students.

reviews.review_heading: A vibrant and colourful campus description.
reviews.review_text: This campus consists of 7.5 acres of land. Classrooms are equipped with led screens and projector. Wi-Fi has also decent speed. There is a basketball court in the campus. You will find the cafeteria most interesting and beautiful. Library is also there along with computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: I am a finance student, so according to me, the faculty in finance are very good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: They provide 2 connections for Wi-Fi. The library is very good, and all kinds of books are available as per AICTE norms because it follows AITCE rules and regulations. In the library, there are some computers to work on. Other than that, there are computer labs with around 50 computers. They provide a laptop to each individual. Food in the canteen is good. The hostel rooms have A/C and separate bathroom facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Nurturing individuals for a better career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college attracts many students. That's the reason I was also attracted to IILM. In IILM, you will be getting a proper infrastructure which is required by any elite college. If I talk about classrooms, labs, sports, etc., all were fabulous.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, global tours and college experience justify its fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. 3 boys hostel and 1 girls hostel. 2 boys hostels are outside the campus and cab facility are there. The college building looks like IIMs building copy. The cafeteria is also good. The playground is not much big, but still, okay for football. One basketball court, no ground for cricket is available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and curriculum. Dissatisfied with hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the main college building is good. All the facilities are available including the library, computer labs, basketball court, auditorium, Wi-Fi, canteen. The food in the canteen is good, and hygiene is maintained. The hostels look good, but facilities such as proper electricity, hot water during winters, and much more are big issues. The management which maintains the hostel is not at all cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Life changing and career-oriented experience.
reviews.review_text: It has the best infrastructure in Delhi NCR. Hostels are superb and very well maintained. It is a clean, hygienic and totally green campus. Basketball court and big lawns for chilling out after classes are also available. The college keeps maintaining its buildings. The staff continuously keeps cleaning the whole area.

reviews.review_heading: Individually this college has a few flaws, but the thing is every college in NCR are same.
reviews.review_text: As the college population is not so very high therefore the infrastructural requirements are low. The sports facilities are growing at a decent pace, but there is no playground. The gym facility is decent, and computer labs are well-maintained. But a small suggestion, recharge your mobile data before taking admission because Wi-Fi facility is below average. The hostel and food facility is great, and you will not face any problem over here.

individual_reviews.title: Excellent placement opportunities and modern.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed varies across institutions and courses here are some examples, XIME Bangalore. 173 students out of 169-179 2024 indicating placements. The highest package of 6.75 LPA is offered with the lowest package being 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Course infrastructure is good. State-of-the-art classrooms are equipped with modern technology such as projectors screens audio systems. There are online learning platforms, utilizing digital tools for remote learning discussion forums, and resource sharing. Hostel infrastructure is good. There are comfortable accommodations and spacious rooms with essential amenities such as beds, desks, and storage.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college you can invest for your future.

content.Placements: About 75% to 80% of students got placed from our college. The highest package is 6 LPA and the average is 3 LPA. The recruiting companies such as Tulib Lab Pvt Ltd, various health care institutions, and Aurgia Research and also with various pharmaceutical industries have a strong linkage with our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the best infrastructure with greenery, well-maintained cleanliness, and there are lots of flowers. Facilities such as a hostel for both boys and girls, with delicious mess food available. There are smart classrooms and a smart computer lab. All the labs are well-maintained. The library has knowledgeable books. The newly made canteen is so beautiful, and the food tastes amazing. Sports events are also held for students to enjoy games both indoors and outdoors are held and is fun.

admission_process.title: Krishna Group Of Institutions, Kanpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Krishna Group of Institutions admission 2025is currently open. The institution offers multiple courses, such as BTech, BPharma, MSc, etc., at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institution also offers UG Diploma, MSc, GNM and DPharma courses. To get admission toKrishna Group of Institutions, candidates will be selected based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Moreover, the institute is affiliated withAKTU,BTE, UPSMF, andABVMU. The application process at KGI is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutKrishna Group of Institutions' course admission2025.

KGIoffers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Nursing, etc. The mode of study atKrishna Group of Institutionsis full-time. Krishna Group of Institutions is affiliated with AKTU and ABVMU. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete graduation or Class 12 as per the respective courses for the selection process. The institute is also known as KGI, Kanpur. Krishna Group of Institutions, Kanpur has sub-institutes under its ambit:Krishna Institute of Technology(KIOT),Krishna Institute of Pharmacy & Sciences(KIPS), andKrishna Institute of Nursing Science & Research(KINSR). Check out the following table for details aboutKGIcourse admissions2025:
Particulars
Krishna Group of Institutions Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Level of programmes offered

KGI course admissionsare primarily merit-based. Students need to satisfy the minimum educational qualification. The institute may conduct further selection rounds if it deems it necessary. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The eligibility criteria may vary slightly depending on various factors. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularKrishna Group of Institution courses:

Krishna Group of Institutions' admission processincludes registration and entrance exam scores as per the respective courses. Students looking to enrol on any of the offered courses are required to complete the multi-step procedure of admission. The application process for the institute is carried out online. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepKrishna Group of Institutions admission processexplained below:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can apply online at the official website of the institute. Students must complete the entire application process, which includes filling out the application form, uploading the required documents, and paying the application fees. However, aspirants also have to meet the eligibility criteria mentioned in the table presented above.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Students are mainly shortlisted based on academic performance in the last qualifying exam. It is mandatory that aspirants meet the preset admission criteria, as failure to do so would result in cancellation of candidature.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theKrishna Group of Institutions feeto confirm their seats at the university.
KGI Eligibility Criteria

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placement opportunities and modern.
reviews.review_text: Course infrastructure is good. State-of-the-art classrooms are equipped with modern technology such as projectors screens audio systems. There are online learning platforms, utilizing digital tools for remote learning discussion forums, and resource sharing. Hostel infrastructure is good. There are comfortable accommodations and spacious rooms with essential amenities such as beds, desks, and storage.

reviews.review_heading: The best college you can invest for your future.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure with greenery, well-maintained cleanliness, and there are lots of flowers. Facilities such as a hostel for both boys and girls, with delicious mess food available. There are smart classrooms and a smart computer lab. All the labs are well-maintained. The library has knowledgeable books. The newly made canteen is so beautiful, and the food tastes amazing. Sports events are also held for students to enjoy games both indoors and outdoors are held and is fun.

reviews.review_heading: Joining Krishna Institute, Pharmacy and Sciences was a turning point in my life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good and the food is so good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good campus environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean and green and equipped with a digital lab, a well-stocked library, and good classroom facilities. Free Wi-Fi in classrooms and computer labs. Digital learning makes studying more effective and accessible. Sports are conducted every week, overall good food quality.

reviews.review_heading: KGI is the best for students.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean, green, and equipped with modern labs a well-stocked library, and good classroom facilities. The Wi-Fi-enabled campus and digital learning tools make studying more effective and accessible. The laboratories are well-equipped with modern instruments and the library house a comprehensive collection of pharmaceutical tests and journals.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is very helpful to the students and always stands to support me.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is clean, well-maintained, and free from pets. The food in the mess or canteen nutrition, diverse and of food quality. The hostel is secure with security measures like guards and CCTV cameras. The room condition of my college is well clean and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Education is the best in college. Faculty members and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is well-cleaned, green, and equipped with modern labs. There is a well-stocked library and good classroom facilities. The design of the college is very nice, with airy classrooms, a big playground, and an open-air theatre. It is located in the best area. The hospital and theatre are near the college.

reviews.review_heading: A transformative journey at Krishna Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The campus is modern, well-maintained, and provides ample resources for students to excel. Laboratories are well-equipped with modern instruments. Library houses a comprehensive collection of pharmaceutical texts and journals. Our college has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi connections, and digital resources further enhance the learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: Krishna Group: Building the future with excellence.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean, green, and equipped with modern labs, a well-stocked library, and good classroom facilities. The Wi-Fi-enabled campus and digital learning tools make studying more effective and accessible. Krishna Group of Institutions offers state of the art infrastructure that supports both learning and research.  The pharmacy department is well-equipped with modern labs.

reviews.review_heading: I had the opportunity to experience the KGI campus, it is an amazing place to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: Labs were equipped with the latest hardware and software, allowing students to work on projects and assignments. The library is well-stocked and provides access to a vast collection of books, journals, and online resources. The Wi-Fi speed is high. The food in the canteen is good and many sports and games were organized on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: KGI provides strong placements and a holistic environment.
reviews.review_text: Krishna Group of Institutions offers one of the best infrastructure with modern lecture halls, well-equipped labs, and one of the best libraries. It truly feels like a home away from home. The campus is clean green, and beautifully maintained. The hostels are top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: Good and affordable college for students. A bus facility is also there.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is worth the fee structure. Hostels are safe for both girls and boys. There is also a gym inside the hostel and library. The mess has every facility. The food of the mess is different on every single day of the week. Snack hours are different. Saturday is considered as a games day. Many indoor and outdoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: About the college: KGI Kanpur .
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi connectivity, and labs are also well-maintained, and computer labs are very well-maintained. The library is also well-equipped and maintained. All average facilities are available in this college, and sports programs happen.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are very good. Our college has many labs like an electrical lab, a chemistry lab, etc. It has workshops. The hostel rooms are very good. The hostel has 24X7 electricity and free Wi-Fi. The mess provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Very good facilities and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Kiot hostel is very good and has very good facilities such as, 24 hours light and free Wi-Fi. Rooms are also clean and also a gym is available in the hostel. Students also play cricket and volleyball in regular basis.

college_info.college_name: Siddharth University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Siddharth University is an university. It is located in Uttar Pradesh. Siddharth University provides PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across different specialisations. Some of the course offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM. Siddharth University offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies. Siddharth University offers all the campus facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Masters of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Average College For MBAu2026.

review_content.Placements: It was an overall good experience at Siddharth University. As per my calculations, 60% of students got placed in MBA. The average package was 3 LPA. The companies that came to my college were TCS, PhonePe, etc. More than 90% of students got internships, and my college offered many specializations in MBA, like Marketing, Finance, HR, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: A high-speed internet connection was provided in the hostel, and there was a library in the hostel for studying. Since there were no labs in the MBA program, the canteen facility was available. One thing that was lacking was the absence of co-curricular activities like sports, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: All the students are good.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.A. from Ram Sahay Kanya Mahavidyalaya affiliated by Siddharth University. In my college, the maximum number of students present in my classroom is about 30% of the total students in the school, which is about 7000 to 8000. The scholarships we get per year in my college are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no labs for non-practical subjects, but for subjects like Physics and Chemistry, practical labs are present. Students perform regular practical experiments in the labs. There is no hostel. All the students are very lucky to have this college and all the teachers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in our collage

review_content.Placements: Every student get good placement well reputed and renowned companies curriculum was excellent. College provide us intership for better future and experience. We have faculties ,who are very educated knowledge and experienced. They are very helpful and understandable well communication. 28 Feb 2019
review_content.Infrastructure: Ofcourse cricket is pleasuring of our collage and supportive teacher ?College Infrastructure The college have good classrooms and it has big playground and does carry school best regards possible to placement College Right is a service that helps students stay on top of their workload and college application process. One student says that College Right helped them manage their stress and stay ahead of their schedule.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best college by infrastructure and facilities-wise in our locality.

review_content.Placements: Poor placement records at this college. If you do not want regular attendance, you can choose it. Not good placement records. Not good facilities and curriculum system. Just okay for facility, infrastructure, and value for money only. Greedy of degree students can join.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is average. Infrastructure is average to good, but no lab work, Wi-Fi available, and also faculty is not good. An average college. If you only want a degree and you do not want regular attendance, you can join it. Overall, a good college for infrastructure and value for money.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice college with qualified teachers.

review_content.Placements: I think there is not much placement at all; some job opportunities are getting in there. The highest package is 1.6 lacs per annum, so I think the lowest is 1 lac only, which is good for beginners. 60 percent of students get internships in my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in my college, Maharani Lal Kunwari Snatkottar Mahavidyalaya, which offers you a lot of course games and other facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, etc. The canteen and medical facility are good enough.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities are very good.

review_content.Placements: Our course has successfully placed 70% of students, with a salary range from 30,000 to 100,000 and an average package of 8 Lacs. Aakash Educational Services stands out as the leading recruiting company, providing internships to 70% of our students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department's infrastructure is excellent, with clean labs and classrooms. The hostel facilities are of high quality, and the food in the mess and canteen is always fresh. Additionally, there are ample medical facilities and a wide range of sports and games available.

college_info.intro:
Praxis Tech School Kolkata offers postgraduate programmes in Data Science and Data Engineering. PGP Data Science with Generative AI & ML is the flagship programme of Praxis Tech School Kolkata. PGP Data Science is offered in full-time mode, for a duration of nine months. Analytics India Magazine has also ranked it 1st among all the PG Data Science programmes in India for the past three years in a row. The PGP Data Science and PGP Data Engineering courses are divided into 3 trimesters and include a series of lectures, case studies, assignments, and projects.
Further, the PGP Data Science programme helps students learn various data-visualisation tools such as Python, R, SQL, Spark, Tableau, and Power BI, among others. The PGP Data Engineering programme is co-created with Genpact, Latent View Analytics, and CHUBB. Praxis Tech School Kolkata also offers placement assistance to students. Please find below the latest information about popular programmes offered by Praxis Tech School Kolkata, along with other courses:

placements.overview:
Praxis Tech School placements 2025 data is currently unavailable. The same will be updated here once officially released by the institute.

According to the 2023 Praxis Tech School placements details, the highest package received by PGP Data Science students at Praxis Tech School, Kolkata was INR 23 LPA. Furthermore, the students received a median package of INR 13 LPA. More than 80 recruiters made their way to the Praxis Tech campus to recruit the freshest of talent.

The average package during the Praxis Tech School, Kolkata placements 2024 was INR 13.50 LPA. Some of the top recruiters at the institute were Mother Dairy, Bandhan Bank, Colgate, EY, PwC, Subex, Tata Steel, WNS, among several others.

admission_overview.title: Praxis Tech School, Kolkata Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Praxis Tech School Kolkata admission 2025 is currently open. The college admits students primarily based on their performance in the selection rounds conducted by the college. Situated in Kolkata, the college provides a full-time postgraduate diploma in Data Science & AI Skills. Additionally, students can also pursue part-time hybrid certificate courses in Cloud Data Engineering and AI for Business Analytics. The application process for the college mainly commences online. Those seeking to join Praxis Tech School Kolkata must ensure that they meet the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for the same. The following article contains the latest information surrounding Praxis Tech School Kolkata admission.

eligibility_selection.title: Praxis Tech School, Kolkata Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Praxis Tech School Kolkata course admission is subject to the fulfilment of preset admission criteria. Candidates are shortlisted based on several parameters, such as academic qualification, aptitude test, followed by a personal interview. The college conducts an in-house aptitude test, i.e., Praxis Aptitude Test (PAT). The basic eligibility can vary depending on the course. Students who meet Praxis Tech School Kolkata eligibility can start the admission process by registering themselves online. The flagship Postgraduate Diploma in Data Science & AI Skills course is offered for a duration of one year in full-time mode. Whereas, the certificate programmes, i.e., Cloud Data Engineering and Gen AI for Business Analytics, are offered for a duration of six months and four months, respectively. Interested students can check out the following table to learn all about the admission criteria for Praxis Tech School Kolkata courses:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Praxis Tech School Kolkata PGPDS course admission?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for the Post-Graduate Program in Data Science (PGPDS) at Praxis Tech School, Kolkata are as follows:A.  Graduates with a minimum of 60% in any of the following disciplines from a recognised or Deemed University or BE/BTech/BSc (with Economics/Statistics as one of the subjects)B.   Graduates from any other stream with Mathematics/Statistics as one of the subjects or postgraduates with a minimum of 60% from any of the following disciplines from a recognised/Deemed University or a recognised college:C.   ME/MTech/MSc (with Economics/Statistics as one of the subjects) with minimum of 60% in Class 10 and 12.Hence, these eligibility criteria ensure that candidates have a strong academic background in relevant disciplines, preparing them for the rigorous curriculum of the PGPDS programme.

college_info.college_name: Praxis Tech School Kolkata Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, Praxis Tech School, Kolkata offers the below mentioned scholarships:
Praxis Scholarships: The Praxis Scholarships for PGP Data Science are divided in 3 categories:
Eligibility: Students need to have 85% in Class 10 and 12, respectively and 75% in graduation. Additionally, the candidate should not have any year gap or backlogs during their academic career.
Condition for continuation of the scholarship:
1. Rank in the top 20% of the class, and
2. Maintain a minimum CQPI of 5.2 out of 8 in each trimester
2. Praxis Business School Foundation Scholarships – five scholarships per intake

This scholarship would be given to meritorious candidates whose annual family income is less than INR 4 Lacs per year; income affidavit supporting the same needs to be submitted for review by the board.
Scholarship Amount: INR 1 Lacs per candidate
Eligibility: Students need to have 75% in Class 10 and 12, respectively and 70% in graduation. Additionally, the candidate should not have any year gap or backlogs during their academic career.
"In addition, students should not have any backlog or break of more than a year in either their academic or corporate career."
Condition for continuation of the scholarship: 1. Maintain a minimum CQPI of 5.0 out of 8 in each trimester
3. Women in Tech Scholarships – Applicable for all women aspirants
Scholarship Amount: INR 1 Lacs per candidate

Praxis WiT (Women in Tech) Scholarships is an initiative to encourage and support greater participation by women in tech and data careers. This is in line with belief that gender diversity in the workforce, especially in tech, brings immense value to the organization, the economy, and society. The Praxis Women in Tech (WiT) Scholarship is awarded to all selected women aspirants applying for the Praxis PG Program in Data Science. Awardees need to maintain a minimum CQPI of 5.0/8.0 throughout the duration of the programme.

overview_faqs.answer: Aditya College of Engineering is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM, After 1th Diploma, UG Diploma, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Aditya College of Engineering has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.6 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aditya Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aditya College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Many students in my college have joined the CSE course only. In M.Tech, many preferred the CSE course. My batch has a lot of students in CSE. The highest package in my college is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA per annum. Many top companies in India have offered jobs in my academic year. Very few students go for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good. The infrastructure is very good. There are canteens, labs that are well-equipped, and nice classrooms with CC cameras. There is one small library, and students can go to the library at any time. There is a small medical clinic for hostelers only. There is free time for students, so we can play during that time.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best and good placements.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Accenture, Google, and Microsoft. The top roles were Project Manager and Software Developer. Around 60% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities were good, with separate hostels for boys and girls. The mess was good. Water purifiers and washing machines were available. The infrastructure was good. The classrooms were neat, and labs were well-equipped. The library was good. Wi-Fi was not available. The medical facilities were good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A challenging and good college.

content.Placements: 70 to 75% percent of students got placed. The highest salary package is 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Google and Microsoft. Around 65% percent of students got an internship. The top roles are project manager and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good infrastructure. The college building is good. The classrooms are big with comfortable benches. The computer labs are good with internet connection. There are many books in the library. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in VLSI Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: M.Tech VLSI design course admission in 2025-26.

content.Placements: In this college, there are many facilities available, and there is the best package provided by the companies. This company is providing a 3 LPA to 7 LPA package. There are companies providing placements based on the knowledge and grade obtained by passing the exam.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the best infrastructure is available and there are multiple facilities provided to the students. In this college, there are 5 departments for all the courses. Every year, a sports and cultural event is organized. In this college, the canteen food is also good and very tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a nice college.

content.Placements: The top recruiting companies for our course are Baja Electronics, Tata Steel, and Larsen and Toubro. Nearly 80% of students got internships in top companies. 90% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. It provides major roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my course is below average. It has just a simple infrastructure, not so attractive and even not good. Labs are really so bad. Classrooms of my course are like school. The library is not available for anyone and they just say that the library is open 24x7 but it is not real at all. The hostel infrastructure is below average, and no one likes it. The food in the hostel mess is very bad. Food is like animals' food, and they think we are animals. There is no medical facility. Games are good here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. The infrastructure is very good. There are canteens, labs that are well-equipped, and nice classrooms with CC cameras. There is one small library, and students can go to the library at any time. There is a small medical clinic for hostelers only. There is free time for students, so we can play during that time.

reviews.review_heading: Best and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities were good, with separate hostels for boys and girls. The mess was good. Water purifiers and washing machines were available. The infrastructure was good. The classrooms were neat, and labs were well-equipped. The library was good. Wi-Fi was not available. The medical facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: A challenging and good college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure. The college building is good. The classrooms are big with comfortable benches. The computer labs are good with internet connection. There are many books in the library. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: M.Tech VLSI design course admission in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the best infrastructure is available and there are multiple facilities provided to the students. In this college, there are 5 departments for all the courses. Every year, a sports and cultural event is organized. In this college, the canteen food is also good and very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course is below average. It has just a simple infrastructure, not so attractive and even not good. Labs are really so bad. Classrooms of my course are like school. The library is not available for anyone and they just say that the library is open 24x7 but it is not real at all. The hostel infrastructure is below average, and no one likes it. The food in the hostel mess is very bad. Food is like animals' food, and they think we are animals. There is no medical facility. G...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the way of teaching faculty members, good placements, and well maintained.
reviews.review_text: When coming to the facilities and infrastructure, there are specialized labs for EEE courses, such as electrical machines lab, power electronics lab, control systems lab, electronics lab, etc. We have modern classrooms with teaching aids like projectors, whiteboards, etc. A well-stocked library with books, journals, and online databases relevant to EEE are also available. Mess facilities typically provide both vegetarian and non-vegetarian. Basic medical facilities and tie-ups with nearby hospit...

reviews.review_heading: Aditya College of Engineering is one of the spacious colleges.
reviews.review_text: Aditya College Hostel is one of the most spacious colleges ever I have seen. It is quite expensive but the food and the cleaning of the three rooms are worth it. Students get 24/7 Wi-Fi in the hostel and college. Water and generator services are available. The breakfast timings are from 7:30 AM to 8:30 AM. The menu will change. It provides egg, milk, and tea. Lunch timings are from 12:30 PM to 1:50 PM. Its menu changes daily. Chicken is provided on Wednesday and Sunday. The dinner timings are fr...

reviews.review_heading: College is good for coding and studying purposes, but if you want cultural activities, choose anothe
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good for university people, so you expect good infra. Labs are well-equipped. The food is very good; you will daily get eggs for breakfast, and weekly 3 days non-veg. Every two weeks, there will be a sporting event. The Wi-Fi speed is very good, but the rules here are very strict. You have to wear a uniform daily.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, this college discovered my strength, which I can do whenever and whatever I decide.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by my campus are classrooms, labs, library, sports, and, foremost, a technical training hub for software training for those who have much interest in the software sector. Hostel infrastructure and food are pleasant compared to other campuses.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Aditya College of Engineering boasts excellent facilities for ECE students, including Wi-Fi-enabled labs, well-equipped classrooms, and a comprehensive library. Hostel facilities are adequate with clean rooms, quality food in the mess and canteen, decent medical facilities, and ample sports and games options. The infrastructure supports a conducive learning environment and an active lifestyle.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty teachers are good and friendly.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is also well-equipped with Wi-Fi connectivity, reading halls, and may more facilities like vast mess halls, all-time medical facilities, and a canteen about 15 hours a day. The college infrastructure is good. The classrooms are in good condition, and the facilities are very good. The library and labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: Classrooms are well-maintained; they are clean and well-maintained.
reviews.review_text: The living spaces are clean; there's nothing more to say. The percentage of students getting good placements is about 80%, and their communication skills and knowledge in their field are the highest salary package was about 7 lac, and the average salary was 5 lac.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely happy with my College.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides free internet in labs and we have a technical hub with free Wi-Fi and AC, where technical training goes on. Our college infrastructure is very good with beautiful things and trees and plants. Our college provides a library with different books and we can take books for 15 days free of cost from the library. The hostel is very good and the food is also good. And we have different canteens with a wide variety of foods.

reviews.review_heading: Review of a beautiful college by an Adityan student.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are excellent. There are also excellent resources in my college, like libraries of different types, like magazines and electronics libraries, in which computers are given for learning purposes, and very speedy connections are provided in classes and hostels too by the management. In terms of quality, the food and facilities in the hostel are very nice and very clean. 
And the quality of the food available in the canteen and mess is nice a...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good in the college.
reviews.review_text: Food quality is good in the campus hostels, and a variety of items are provided by the hostels for the students. There is free Wi-Fi, classrooms with projectors and digital boards are provided by the college for all students on campus and labs are available.

college_info.intro: ISHM Kolkata offers UG, PG, and diploma courses across Management. BBA and MBA are the popular courses offered at the International School of Hospitality Management. The institute offers a three-year BBA programme at the UG level. The BBA programmes offered at the institute cover core courses in Aviation Management and Hospital Management. The institute offers a two-year PGPM/ MBA programme in Hospitality Management. Below mentioned are ISHM Kolkata popular programmes:

placements.overview: International School of Hospitality Management has achieved various rankings and awards from different ranking bodies. Below are some of the details:

faqs.answer: A:    As placement team from International school of hospitality management putting it's 100% efforts for students getting placed.By previous year international school of hospitality management gave 94% of placements.As the placement team put their 100% of hardwork, so 100% of placement may depend on students interests and their efforts.
faqs.question: Does International School of Hospitality Management provide 100% placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Students completing graduation from PGPM in Hospital Management from ISHM Kolkata have a diverse array of career opportunities in the healthcare sector. Moreover, to get those opportunities, students are required to excel in skills related to administrative and managerial roles in healthcare settings. Some of the offered career opportunities are:Hospital Administrator/ Operations ManagerClinical ManagerHealth Services ManagerMedical and Health Services AdministratorHospital HR ManagerHealt
faqs.question: What are the career opportunities available after completing PGPM in Hospital Management from ISHM Kolkata?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the institute has a well-dedicated placement cell that coordinates with top recruiters in and around the world. The institute generally conducts placement interviews in the final semester. So far, the ISHM Kolkata placement rate recorded over the recent years was 94%. Some students have also managed to get placed before they pass out from the institute. Novotel Hotel, Clarks Hotel, Aditya Birla Group, and Spicejet are some of the recurring companies that visited the campus.
faqs.question: Does ISHM Kolkata have a placement cell?

faqs.answer: A:    The students pursuing a Bachelor of Hotel Management degree are eligible to work in the Hospitality sector. The average salary package offered to the graduates ranges between INR 2 LPA and INR 5 LPA. A few popular job options available after ISHM Kolkata BHM along with the average package offered are mentioned below:Career ChoicesAverage SalaryHotel ManagerINR 4.44 LPAFront Office ManagerINR 3.06 LPAChefINR 3 LPAFood and Beverage ManagerINR 5.71 LPAClick Here, to know more about Career Aft
faqs.question: What are the career options available after BHM from ISHM Kolkata?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
ISHM Kolkata offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses. At the UG level, the institute offers BBA, BSc, and other programmes to the students. At the PG level, the institute offers an MBA in Hospital Management. Below mentioned are the International School of Hospitality Management courses and ISHM Kolkata fees:

For more information about International School of Hospitality Management Fees check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Hi.No, International School of Hospitality Management is not much  expensive.The fee is set in such a way that there is easy accessibility to education and eligible students get the opportunity to gain suitable knowledge and skills in their chosen field of study. Overall, the institute has fixed a fee range of INR 145,000-380,000 for which it provides great educational value and good infrastructure.Thanks
faqs.question: Is International School of Hospitality Management expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    Located in Haryana, International School of Hospitality Management offers various courses to students in full-time mode. The fee for B.Sc. at the International School of Hospitality Management is INR 3.50 Lakh. The fee is set in such a way that there is easy accessibility to education and eligible students get the opportunity to gain suitable knowledge and skills in their chosen field of study.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Sc at International School of Hospitality Management?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for the BHM programme at International School of Hospitality Management, the candidate must have passed 10+2 from a recognized board. The total tuition fee for the course in INR 3.80 Lakhs. The candidate may have to pay soe additional charges like hostel fee and application fee.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BHM programme offered by International School of Hospitality Management?

faqs.answer: A:    ISHM Kolata provides hostels to the BSc students, and the fees of the hostel rooms vary according to the accommodation selected by the students. Check out the type of accommodation available with their rent in the table below: Room Type & SharingLodging Fees Per YearAC room – Single OccupancyINR 1.20 lakh AC room – Twin OccupancyINR 96,000AC room – Triple OccupancyINR 84,000Non AC room – Single OccupancyINR 72,000Non AC room – Twin OccupancyINR 60,000Non AC room – Triple OccupancyINR 48,000The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change. Therefore, it is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: I am doing well by taking admission here at ISHM, and I am liking it a lot.

review_content.Placements: The top recruiting companies were Indigo, SpiceJet, and Air India. Almost 60% of students got internships from my course and college. The top roles offered in my course were cabin crew, ground staff, cargo handler, airport manager, etc. My college also provided training in Malaysia Airlines as it had a tie-up. We got internships from companies, which helped a lot to gain practical knowledge about the industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom was good and big enough. A proper Wi-Fi connection. There was a good library with all kinds of books. Labs were big and looked real, which impressed me. My classroom had a capacity of at least 70 students. The hostel rooms were good and spacious, and the food was average, not so bad. We even had sports day events, which were good for most students. Overall, it was good. I loved it.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Aviation Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: ISHM School of Aviation Tourism and Hospitality, good facilities, campus life, etc.

review_content.Placements: Once the students complete their 5th semester, they become eligible for internships and placements. There are various reputed companies like Indigo, Air India, etc., visiting our campus. Companies provide good average package of around Rs 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and it is designed as per the requirements of the students. The college has its own library for students with different varieties of books, textbooks, storybooks, journals, etc. College also has various labs like aviation lab, front office lab, F&B service lab, etc. Each classroom has been provided with screen projectors for digital and practical learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Strong industry exposure with good placements, but faculty members and facilities could improve.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students securing internships in a hotel management course typically depends on the college's industry connections and placement support. In reputed hotel management colleges, 80%-100% of students secure internships in well-known hospitality brands.
review_content.Infrastructure: High-speed internet access is available across campus, including classrooms, libraries, and hostels. Labs are well-equipped training, kitchens, bakery labs, and F&B service labs for hands-on learning. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned with modern teaching aids like projectors.

Also, the best thing is you can have the opportunity to go and stay in a 5-star hotel as PHT trainer from the college.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, good place to learn.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. It has a mini library, a kitchen for practicals, even one extra room for FNB service practicals, and one office room decorated as an exception desk to teach us front office practicals. Even a room with a bed for housekeeping practicals. Classrooms are good and fully air-conditioned.

Overall, it was good. I loved it.

admission_process.title: International School of Hospitality Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: ISHM Kolkata admission 2025is conducted online. Students can apply online for admission toInternational School of Hospitality Management. Admissions are based on the merit scores obtained in the previous exam. The college offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels courses. At the UG level, students can choose from a three-year BBA program, Dual Programme in Hospitality, Hotel & Tourism Management, and BSc courses. The BBA program has three specializations to offer. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MHA and PGPM courses, with the latter being offered in dual specializations for three years. The college offers one-year diploma courses in two specializations and three-year advanced diploma courses to the students.
The ISHM Kolkata courses offer undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels courses. ISHM Kolkata admission is merit-based. Check out the table below:

placement_data.title: ISHM Kolkata Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: ISHM Kolkata works with hotels and hospitality businesses in India and across the world, to ensure that students have access to best training practices. The institute arranges campus interviews in the final semester. Every year, 94% of the batch gets placed in top companies globally, such as Expedia, Hyatt, Aditya Birla Group, TAJ Hotels, etc. The official placement report or brochure is yet to be released. As per the data gathered from Shiksha students' reviews, the salary offered to the passed-out students in recent years of ISHM Kolkata placements was around INR 2.50 LPA .

faqs.question: Does International School of Hospitality Management provide 100% placements?
faqs.answer: As placement team from International school of hospitality management putting it's 100% efforts for students getting placed.By previous year international school of hospitality management gave 94% of placements. As the placement team put their 100% of hardwork, so 100% of placement may depend on students interests and their efforts.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities available after completing PGPM in Hospital Management from ISHM Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Students completing graduation from PGPM in Hospital Management from ISHM Kolkata have a diverse array of career opportunities in the healthcare sector. Moreover, to get those opportunities, students are required to excel in skills related to administrative and managerial roles in healthcare settings. Some of the offered career opportunities are: Hospital Administrator/ Operations Manager Clinical Manager Health Services Manager Medical and Health Services Administrator Hospital HR Manager Healthcare Finance Manager, etc.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at International School of Hospitality Management placements?
faqs.answer: According to 2023 placement reports, 94% of students got placed. The average salary package offered by recruiters is INR 2.5 to 3 Lacs per annum. The highest package offered by recruiters is INR 11.5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiters from international school of hospitality and management are Aditya Birla group, Taj hotel, Hyatt, etc.
