hostel_campus.college_name: ISHM Kolkata International School of Hospitality Management Infrastructure

reviews.review_heading: They ensure each of them gets placements as per their understanding.
reviews.review_text: No hostels are provided but there is food canteen which serves food that is made and served in a very hygienic way. There are lots of games held in the college like football or cricket. Both girls and boys participate and it is absolutely fun. Also, the best thing is you can have the opportunity to go and stay in a 5-star hotel as PHT trainer from the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good place to learn.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. It has a mini library, a kitchen for practicals, even one extra room for FNB service practicals, and one office room decorated as an exception desk to teach us front office practicals. Even a room with a bed for housekeeping practicals. Classrooms are good and fully air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: I am doing well by taking admission here at ISHM, and I am liking it a lot.
reviews.review_text: The classroom was good and big enough. A proper Wi-Fi connection. There was a good library with all kinds of books. Labs were big and looked real, which impressed me. My classroom had a capacity of at least 70 students. The hostel rooms were good and spacious, and the food was average, not so bad. We even had sports day events, which were good for most students. Overall, it was good. I loved it.

reviews.review_heading: ISHM School of Aviation Tourism and Hospitality, good facilities, campus life, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and it is designed as per the requirements of the students. The college has its own library for students with different varieties of books, textbooks, storybooks, journals, etc. College also has various labs like aviation lab, front office lab, F&B service lab, etc. Each classroom has been provided with screen projectors for digital and practical learning.

reviews.review_heading: Strong industry exposure with good placements, but faculty members and facilities could improve.
reviews.review_text: High-speed internet access is available across campus, including classrooms, libraries, and hostels. Labs are well-equipped training, kitchens, bakery labs, and F&B service labs for hands-on learning. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned with modern teaching aids like projectors.

reviews.review_heading: ISHM It is a very good college and I have made a good choice to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious and have a good Wi-Fi connection. There's a well-equipped library, and the labs are large and realistic, which impresses me. The faculty members are knowledgeable and always ready to assist students. The exam process is well-managed, and I truly enjoy my time here.

reviews.review_heading: Best Management College in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities are available in this college, like screen projectors for comprehensive and practical-based learning. The classrooms are big enough for the comfortable accommodation of students. The college has a big library which has numerous journals, textbooks. The college does not provide any hostel facilities, but PGs are there. Medical facilities are available. Annual sports are held every year in the month of January.

reviews.review_heading: College is really amazing; they have good placements every year, and they give scholarships as well.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and technology are very impressive, which will help the students understand the concept easily. They have upgraded their technology day by day for students so they can catch the knowledge and update themselves in a good entertaining environment.

reviews.review_heading: ISHM has excellent labs and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The College is spacious and has air conditioned classrooms. The labs are fully equipped with all the modern amenities and equipments for smooth conducting of classes. Our classes are mainly practical based and we have an extensive use of the Practical labs for learning.

reviews.review_heading: Best College with International and National Placements.
reviews.review_text: The college campus comprises of two buildings. The classrooms are fully air conditioned and the labs are state of the Art. The focal point is the Green Production Lab which emits zero carbon. The flight simulator is also great for any Aviation Aspirant.

reviews.review_heading: College with an excellent placements record.
reviews.review_text: The course is very scientifically designed and provides a very practical approach to the curriculum. I have no difficulties in following the lectures as they are more or less practical oriented. The exam schedule is very flexible and provides us ample learning time.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the region.
reviews.review_text:
The college has a fully functional library, a changing room and separate washrooms for boys and girls.
The quality of the food in the mess is really hygienic.
The best part of the college is the state-of-the-art labs.
The aircraft simulator is really excellent.

reviews.review_heading: I am proud to be an ISHMian.
reviews.review_text: We have the best labs and classrooms with ample amounts of space and air-conditioned classes that the college gives us. The best part is our green kitchen lab with a zero-carbon mission, where we understand balance. My dream is to become a chef.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for best growing college and budget friendly, then it can be the best choice.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good; they have projector facilities in all the class rooms, provided hostels are good enough and pockets friendly; the quality of food is also good; the canteen is not there but they deliver the food to the room every day; and medical facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college to which to apply.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides every facility, such as a kitchen for good food and beverages, accommodation, a front office and air-conditioned classrooms that are too good. College provides a hostel facility, which is very good and the food provided by them is of good quality. College does provide medical facilities and sports and games.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Ed and B.P.Ed. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. faqs.answer: A:    Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University offers admission to several UG and PG courses. Admission to all these courses is based completely on the merit. faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

faqs.question: Which courses can I do after a D.Ed.? Should I do a BSc or B.Ed?

answer.text: As an MSc in Food and Nutrition student, you can opt for jobs in industries like healthcare, food production, research, education, etc. While a high-paying job depends on your skills, experience, employer, etc., becoming a Nutritionist, Dietician, Research Associate, or Assistant Professor can also increase your chances of getting a good pay along with relevant experience in the industry. overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. review_summary.college_name: Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. In Botany - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college and facilities, the infrastructure is really good.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of girls are getting an education in my course. The highest package for three years is Rs. 75,000 for B.Sc. Many companies, and 75% of them, offer internships based on their skills development programmes. We will be conducting activities that encourage students to get involved in skill development.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a lab technician, Wi-Fi labs, a smart class board, and a library. The hostel is also available. Sports, games, and medical check-ups are also present. The canteen is also present; everything is inside the campus environment. There is a friendly campus, a good study hall, and labs will be conducted according to the subject. Students can also be involved in extracurricular activities like sports, music, yoga, and competitions etc. Every class has a smart class.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college and well-built infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 70 to 80% of students were placed. About two 2 LPA to 3.5 LPA packages are offered in our college. The internship got from college not that many reputed companies. So our college is a little bit low in this internship concept and otherwise, it's best.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are so peaceful and broad and comfortable. The labs are full of very well-equipped computers which are needed for the course and all. Facilities also well and clean and includes all availabilities like a mess, canteen, well medical facilities and all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry, Botany, Zoology - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Review of Smt. Allum Sumangalamma Memorial College for Women.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed in my course. Recruiting companies were NIIT, SSIT, KPTCL, Jindal etc. Various courses like B.A, BBA, BCA, B.Com and B.Sc. are offered. 50% of students got internships from our course in Jindal, KPTCL, NIIT and SSIT institutions and companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, with advanced chemistry and biology labs. Mess and canteen are available in good condition. Sports and games are not much available. Every classroom is equipped with LCD projectors. Well-equipped libraries are available. Audio-video teaching aid and support enhancements are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Design and Boutique Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good, and the teachers are supportive.

content.Placements: Companies like Arvind Lifestyle, Tommy Hilfiger, Shoppers Stop, Reliance Trends, Tailorman, P N Rao, Central Mall, U Fashions, J P HAUTE COUTURE, Angadi Galleria and Sakhi Fashions visit our college for placements. Roles like a merchandiser, junior merchandiser, visual merchandising, fashion consultant and store manager are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the college till date is good. They provide study material and stationery kit for practical classes for fashion subjects. It also conducts industrial visits and extra classes. It provides magazines related to the fashion field in the library.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Design and Boutique Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good teaching, and teachers are very helpful to students.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies of our college are Arvind, Life Style, Tommy Hilfiger, Sakhi Fashions, Tamanna Boutique, U fashions, J P Haute Couture, PN Rao, Angadi Galleria and Reliance Trends. The top roles offered are as a fashion merchandiser, visual merchandising and fashion consultant.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. We get separate classrooms for theory and practicals. The college has separate laboratories for practical classes, and design studio is provided for boutique set up.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable, qualified and helpful in our all works. They teach all the students individually and will clear our doubts with patience. Overall, teachers and teaching are good on campus. We can learn many things in this college.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University?
faqs.answer: Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University offers admission to several UG and PG courses. Admission to all these courses is based completely on the merit. Some courses also require an entrance exam in order to secure admission. KSAWUV only accepts CMAT, Karnataka PGCET, GUJCET, and KCET scores for entrance-based course admissions.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University?
faqs.answer: Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University offers admission solely on the basis of merit. The eligibility criteria varies for each course. However, the admission to all courses is based on the merit acquired in the qualifying exam as well as scores obtained in the course-level entrance exam. Candidates who wish to apply to KSWU, must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: Can I join BSc at Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University without 85% in PCM?
faqs.answer: Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University offers admission to BSc courses solely on the basis of merit obtained in qualifying examination. However, the university has specified a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12. Candidates with 45% or more have a pretty good chance at getting into the university. However, candidate must have completed Class 12 from a recognised state or national board.

faqs.question: How can I check Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University cutoff for MBA?
faqs.answer: Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University offers admission to the MBA programme on the basis of the scores obtained in CMAT or Karnataka PGCET. The university releases the CMAT and Karnataka PGCET cutoff for the course. Candidates can check the cutoff for MBA courses on the official website of the Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women's University.

reviews.review_text: Classrooms are so peaceful and broad and comfortable. The labs are full of very well-equipped computers which are needed for the course and all. Facilities also well and clean and includes all availabilities like a mess, canteen, well medical facilities and all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2014Offered by Smt. Allum Sumangalamma Memorial College for WomenReviewed on 6 May 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Smt. Allum Sumangalamma Memorial College for Women.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, with advanced chemistry and biology labs. Mess and canteen are available in good condition. Sports and games are not much available. Every classroom is equipped with LCD projectors. Well-equipped libraries are available. Audio-video teaching aid and support enhancements are also provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 4 Mar 2020)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, and the teachers are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college till date is good. They provide study material and stationery kit for practical classes for fashion subjects. It also conducts industrial visits and extra classes. It provides magazines related to the fashion field in the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 2 Mar 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teaching, and teachers are very helpful to students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We get separate classrooms for theory and practicals. The college has separate laboratories for practical classes, and design studio is provided for boutique set up.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 28 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the college for fashion subjects or course are well maintained. Classrooms are very well maintained and fixed with technical teaching. The library is provided with good books for fashion subjects to understand better. Overall the college is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 28 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: It is worth to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are separate laboratories for all subjects. Classrooms are also good for teachers to teach us. Projectors are equipped in each class separately. The library hour is also provided. The library also has good books on fashion subjects.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 28 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Friendly nature of faculty members while teaching.
reviews.review_text: There are good classrooms and laboratories available at college, the classrooms are 6 in number. The laboratories are also available for all the practical classes like pattern making, sewing - stitching, design studio, textile laboratory, draping lab.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 27 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Teachers here teach very politely.
reviews.review_text: As we are started studying this course now, we know only a few details about placements, i.e., we get a number of chances to attend interviewd. Our college provides classes on how to prepare a resume, prepare for interviews, about companies visiting the campus, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 27 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very good place to learn about fashion in less time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and we are experiencing good teaching, along with good infrastructure. Classrooms are also good, and faculty members teach through projectors where we get more interest to listen to the class. The library is also provided with good books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 24 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Opportunities are quite amazing if you have an eye to catch them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and this year it is renovated, laboratories and classrooms are also good with required materials provided for practical classes. The library is also good with amazing fashion related books. Classrooms are fixed with a projector for teaching.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 13 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Good source of knowledge, don't judge a book by its cover.
reviews.review_text: Though the infrastructure is not that big it is sufficient for fashion field. All required materials for all the practical (pattern lab, textile dry and wet lab) classes are provided and maintained well. We are provided with design studio for boutique setup and photo shoot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 13 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Get opportunity to go to PARIS to learn many things about FASHION.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and clean. Sewing lab machines are easy to use and well maintained. Benches and infrastructure are good and renovated. In the library all books are available. The campus is also good with parking facility available. There are labs available for the practicals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 11 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Students can gain extra knowledge and creativity from this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have 6 classrooms,  7 laboratories, draping lab, design studio, pattern lab, sewing lab, textile dry lab and textile wet lab and CAD lab. A library is also available on our campus. The parking area is also provided in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Indian Institute of Fashion TechnologyReviewed on 11 Feb 2020)
reviews.review_heading: The method of teaching is good for the theoretical part and practicals.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and the facilities provided by our college include a design studio and parking area. There are 6 classrooms, and a projector is provided in every classroom for teaching. There are 7 laboratories, including a design studio for practicals.

college_info.college_name: Vanita Vishram Women’s University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2024, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: Vanita Vishram Women’s University admissions 2024-2025 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro:
Vanita Vishram Women’s University popular programmes are BBA and BCom. BCom students can work in sectors such as Banking, Finance, Insurance, Accounting, and Taxation. Vanita Vishram Women’s University BCom students are placed in top companies such as TATA Motors, HDFC Bank, and others. The university has prepared one of the most informative and engaging curriculam for students. The BCom course curriculum includes Financial Accounting, Foundation of Business Management, and others.
Overall, Vanita Vishram Women’s University helps in developing new Vocation-based & Employment-Generating, and Skill-based programmes related to the Textile, Diamond, and Hospitality industries. Overall, Vanita Vishram Women’s University is one of the top universities offering specialised courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Uttarakhand Technical University and their respective eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vanita Vishram Women’s University offers UG, PG, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Commerce, Management, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers BA, BVoc, BSc, BCom, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MA, MSc, MCom, and other courses to students. The total seat intake for BA courses is 500. For some courses, there is a seat reservation. The below-mentioned is seat reservation details for some courses:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are very helpful. My principal MS Abhilasha Agarwal is also very supportive.

review_content.Placements: I completed my B.Com from Vanita Vishram College. During our time, there was COVID-19, and although there was a placement opportunity, only about 15 to 20% of students participated. After earning my B.Com, I found roles as an admin and accountant as a fresher. The B.Com program covers various subjects like accounting, environmental studies, economics, and banking, which helped me learn different skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were big. There was a good vibe in the library too. I did not stay in the hostel so I cannot tell you about it, but some of my friends stayed there, it is very safe. The canteen area was also big. The food was also good. We did a lot of activities on the college campus. I remember the blood donation camps exactly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good teachers, infrastructure, and knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Students who scored above 9 CGPA are the ones who got the best placements. Of course, study is as important as money. If we study well, the package goes above 2 lacs. Scoring above 9 CGPA is not a big deal at VVWU; they will provide all facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything that is important for a good future lies in Vanita Vishram. Classrooms are big, with a projector in each class. The computer lab has 200 PCs. Biological labs are also provided by them. Hostels are clean and provide food much better than other hostels.

review_summary.college_name: Vanita Vishram Women’s University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and best mentors .

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed through this course. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA, the average is 2 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Companies such as Golden Mace, White Range Software, and various other MNCs participated in placements. Around 30% of students secured internships. Common roles included python developer, PHP developer, and UI/UX designer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college, and also the best teachers and the very best mentors. The quality of food in the canteen was the best, and for the 3 years I spent in that college, I used to have the best food in the canteen, which was freaking hygienic and super tasty and also available at reasonable rates.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Food and Nutrition) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with affordable pricing.

content.Placements: A business fair conducted on the college campus itself for final-year students. Hospitals like Ashutosh Hospital interview the students and offer jobs. Each student gets an internship in different hospitals due to our dean's good connections.
content.Infrastructure: Very good facilities. They have two libraries with a lot of books for different backgrounds. There are clean rooms and a good environment with a female warden in the girls hostel. Full protection and safety are provided. Sports Day is also conducted every year with different sports games like chess, badminton, long jump, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very helpful. My principal MS Abhilasha Agarwal is also very supportive.

content.Placements: I completed my B.Com from Vanita Vishram College. During our time, there was COVID-19, and although there was a placement opportunity, only about 15 to 20% of students participated. After earning my B.Com, I found roles as an admin and accountant as a fresher. The B.Com program covers various subjects like accounting, environmental studies, economics, and banking, which helped me learn different skills.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were big. There was a good vibe in the library too. I did not stay in the hostel so I cannot tell you about it, but some of my friends stayed there, it is very safe. The canteen area was also big. The food was also good. We did a lot of activities on the college campus. I remember the blood donation camps exactly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teachers, infrastructure, and knowledge.

content.Placements: Students who scored above 9 CGPA are the ones who got the best placements. Of course, study is as important as money. If we study well, the package goes above 2 lacs. Scoring above 9 CGPA is not a big deal at VVWU; they will provide all facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Everything that is important for a good future lies in Vanita Vishram. Classrooms are big, with a projector in each class. The computer lab has 200 PCs. Biological labs are also provided by them. Hostels are clean and provide food much better than other hostels.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Best three years of my life.

content.Placements: The companies which came for placements were like different accounting firms, different banks for the posts like sales department HR department accounts department marketing department, salary was from Rs.10,000 to Rs.25,000 students also got jobs by clearing DBF exam for banking.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing faculty and top-notch infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Beginning in the fourth semester, students are eligible for on-campus internships. The big four companies, Amazon, and other multinationals come to our university and offer an average of Rs 6,000,000 per year. The maximum package offered is Rs 15,000,000 per year, and the average package is Rs 3,000,000 per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: You can choose between regular and AC rooms, with 1 or 2 students per room depending on your preference. The meals are good; you will receive chicken twice a week and eggs twice a week, which means 4 out of 7 days you will have non-vegetarian options. The hostel is located on the campus. Hostel Fee: INR 72,000 per year.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to study.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of students get placed in our college. Many students got jobs in IT companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. Food served in the canteen is good. Many labs are available such as computer labs, etc. Library is good. Games and sports are available in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good and very knowledgeable. Semester exams are difficult. The pass marks are 24. Lab exams are also conducted. The course curriculum helps students to learn computers. The teaching is very good.

The marks scored in the Konkani First or Second language examinations would be equated with the marks of the optional Konkani (the cognate subject) as follows:60% in Konkani First or Second language to 45% of optional Konkani (the cognate subject).Candidates who have passed any Bachelor degree examination of Mangalore University or any other University considered as equivalent thereto and have secured an aggregate minimum of 45% (40% for SC/ST/Category-I candidates) marks are also eligible to apply if seats are left vacant after considering applications from category 1 and 2 above. The candidates from this category, i.e.; category 3 would be selected solely on the basis of an entrance test designed to test (a) the candidates' ability to read, write and speak Konkani fluently, and (b) a basic awareness of the literary world of Konkani.M.ComCandidate must have B.Com/B.B.M or equivalent with mentioned marks in the aggregate in commerce subjects from any recognised university.BCACandidate must have passed 12th/equivalent from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.CertificateCandidates who have passed 10+2 examination conducted by Karnataka Secondary Education Examination Board or any other examination considered as equivalent theretoLanguage shall be eligible. The marks scored in the Konkani First or Second language examinations would be equated with the marks of the optional Konkani (the cognate subject) as follows:60% in Konkani First or Second language to 45% of optional Konkani (the cognate subject).Candidates who have passed any Bachelor degree examination of Mangalore University or any other University considered as equivalent thereto and have secured an aggregate minimum of 45% (40% for SC/ST/Category-I candidates) marks are also eligible to apply if seats are left vacant after considering applications from category 1 and 2 above. The candidates from this category, i.e.; category 3 would be selected solely on the basis of an entrance test designed to test (a) the candidates' ability to read, write and speak Konkani fluently, and (b) a basic awareness of the literary world of Konkani.M.ComCandidate must have B.Com/B.B.M or equivalent with mentioned marks in the aggregate in commerce subjects from any recognised university.BCACandidate must have passed 12th/equivalent from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.CertificateCandidates who have passed 10+2 examination conducted by Karnataka Secondary Education Examination Board or any other examination considered as equivalent theretoLanguage shall be eligible. Admission will be made strictly in order of merit based on the degree/certificate in each of the following categories:1.Post Graduate and above2.Graduate3.10+2Students who are studying 10+2/Graduate/Post Graduate Level or its equivalent levels may do this programme along with regular classes.UG DiplomaCandidates who have passed the certificate examination in German language conducted by Mangalore University or any other recognised University is eligible for admission. Admission will be made strictly in order of merit of the respective Certificate examination.Candidates who have obtained their certificate in German language from any other institution one year before the year of admission shall be required to appear for an admission test to be conducted by the university.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalent and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates). Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

college_info.intro:
Rathinam School of Business popular programmes are BCA and BBA. BBA students are taught topics ranging from basic Finance and Marketing Management, Accounting Principles, and Human Resource Management to Business Law and Computer Fundamentals. BBA students can even go for higher studies such as MS, MBA, MCA, and MSc (IT). BCA students are placed as Software Developers, Web Designers, Testing, and Database Administrators, and Network Administrators.
Rathinam School of Business is one of the top colleges offering quality education to students. Rathinam School of Business promotes scientific curiosity among the students through its courses. Rathinam School of Business students are today working in companies such as TCS, Infosys, CTS, Capgemini, and others. These courses are provided across the Management, Computer Application, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BBA and BCA courses to students. Through the BBA course, the college tries to offer high-quality professional education in Management. At the PG level, the college offers MBA and MCA courses to students. The MCA department has faculty members that are specialised in Artificial Intelligence, Data mining, Computer Networks, Machine Learning, Software Engineering, and others. admission_process.title: Rathinam School of Business Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rathinam School of Business admissions are currently open. Aspirants can send-in their applications in online mode. Aspirants must follow the steps specific to their course. Below is theRathinam School of Business admission processin detail:
STEP 1: Rathinam School of Business Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form on the school's website. Aspirants seeking admission via PGCET have to register themselves on the official website of KEA.
STEP 2: Selection

The selection for all the UG programmes is merit-based. However, aspirants seeking admission in PG courses i.e. MBA and MCA, aspirants can also get admission via PGCET score. The school also considers scores in CAT, MAT, XAT or GMAT for MBA programme. Selected candidates are required to further pass the GDPI round.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

Those who choose to get admission through PGCET have to participate in PGCET counselling, registration, document verification and seat allotment. Those who get the seat have to report at the campus. For merit-based admission, candidates are informed about their selection. Those who are shortlisted need to come for document verification. Aspirants also need to pay theRathinam School of Business feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: Rathinam School of Business MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Rathinam School of Business offers two-year MBA programme at the PG level. During the course, students have to choose a specialisation. The options available are Marketing, Finance, HR, Operations, Business Analytics, IT and International Business. Candidates who have completed their graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for MBA. The selection for MBA is based on scores of candidates in CAT, XAT, GMAT, MAT or Karnataka PGCET followed by GDPI.

The fees for MBA PGCET will be as per Government Counselling process and may vary as per the university/college students apply to. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat.

faqs.answer: Rathinam School of Business shortlists candidates for admission to MBA programme based on their scores in Karnataka PGCET or CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT. Selected candidates are further called for group discussion and personal interview round. Once selected, aspirants are required to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

placement_data.title: Rathinam School of Business Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rathinam School of Business ’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) gives students access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities , or they can get a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements don’t fulfill the promise. To qualify for POP, students need to keep a minimum average attendance of 70% in all their credit and non-credit classes each semester. They also have to pass all exams with at least an 80% score or the equivalent CGPA, and they shouldn’t have any backlogs. Moreover, students must make sure that all fee payments are done according to the schedule mentioned in the offer letter. Finally, students are expected to follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program. The Rathinam School of Business placement highlights for 2025 are as follows:

Rathinam School Of Business Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 26298 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Rathinam School Of Business. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 26298 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 33414, while in 2023, it was 43223.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses across streams such as Engineering, Architecture, Management Studies and Computer Applications. Students who have completed Class 12/ Diploma may apply for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) 2025 for BE/ BTech programmes admission conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai. Candidates can check the Mohamed Sathak Engineering College courses and fees details in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to the MCA Course is facilitated through the Single Window System. To be eligible, candidates must have completed a Bachelor's Degree with core Mathematics at the class 12 level. Alternatively, they can have studied Mathematics/Statistics as one of the subjects at the degree level. Additionally, candidates must have taken the TANCET Entrance Examination conducted by Anna University, Chennai. Students can select a college based on the rank calculated by their marks in the TANCET. Reservations are provided for BC/MBC/DNC/SC/ST categories, as per the rules of the Government of Tamil Nadu.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates interested in getting into Mohamed Sathak Engineering College are required to follow the NATA/TNEA/TANCET/IMUCET/GATE exam and Mohamed Sathak Engineering College application process. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Business System - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Well-infrastructure and qualified faculty members.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in our course. One of the easiest and interesting departments. One of my classmates was placed at Techsible company as an intern and also as a future employee. There are many roles particularly in our course such as business analyst, data scientist, entrepreneur, data analyst, software developer, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has our own lab with good working internet and good atmosphere view of classroom including well benches and fans. Hostel is well furnished place. Food quality in canteen and mess is amazing. Every year, a sports day is conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the fee I paid, but I can't vibe around.

review_content.Placements: Around only 50% of students get placed in the electrical and electronics engineering department. The highest package is around 5 LPA, and the lowest package is around 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Techsible, TVS, etc. The top role is Project Manager. Around 60% of students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very low compared to other colleges in my city. Infrastructure is average, classrooms are nearly maintained, and the library is very good. Wi-Fi is average. The hostel is the worst, but hostel fees are very high. Hostel food is very hygienic, and rooms are well maintained. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Cyber Security - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am really very satisfied.

content.Placements: Recent year 60-70 percent of students are placed in my college and the salary package is 3 LPA is the lowest and 9 LPA is the highest package offered during this year. Cyber security is recently added course, so no one got internship now, but the other departments are getting jobs if you are good in knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: For each subject, they have separate labs to study about that like Physics, Chemistry, Python, English, and other related fields. Classroom is also very good. Hostel is not maintained properly, I didn't like the hostel because it was not hygienic, but the food is in good condition and made hygienically. Only rooms are bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Cyber Security - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied to join this college, except for the hostel.

content.Placements: 80 percent of the students got placed. 9 LPA is the highest package offered. Zoho and TVS are the companies that offer the job. No one now because the course has been available this year. None of the roles offered in cybersecurity now. Many of the companies are there and are taking students for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available inside the campus and in the canteen, which is also inside the campus and provides quality food. They are separate hostels for boys and girls. They are not really worth the hostel because it was an old building.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Business System - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well-infrastructure and qualified faculty members.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in our course. One of the easiest and interesting departments. One of my classmates was placed at Techsible company as an intern and also as a future employee. There are many roles particularly in our course such as business analyst, data scientist, entrepreneur, data analyst, software developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has our own lab with good working internet and good atmosphere view of classroom including well benches and fans. Hostel is well furnished place. Food quality in canteen and mess is amazing. Every year, a sports day is conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the fee I paid, but I can't vibe around.

content.Placements: Around only 50% of students get placed in the electrical and electronics engineering department. The highest package is around 5 LPA, and the lowest package is around 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Techsible, TVS, etc. The top role is Project Manager. Around 60% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very low compared to other colleges in my city. Infrastructure is average, classrooms are nearly maintained, and the library is very good. Wi-Fi is average. The hostel is the worst, but hostel fees are very high. Hostel food is very hygienic, and rooms are well maintained. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I think fee amount is little valuable at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College, Kilakarai.

content.Placements: In EEE, around 40% of students got placed in the ongoing year. The highest salary package offered at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1.2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Internships are bit good. Around 70% of students secured internships in top recruiting companies like TCS, MRF, and Tata Motors.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available in our course is good. There is no network coverage in some of the college places. Library is very large and useful. When it comes to hostel, it has poor infrastructure with poor hostel food. Hostel rooms are not good but average hostel experience.

admission_overview.college_name: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College admission 2025is open. Mohamed Sathak Engineering College offers various courses in the UG and PG levels. Admission to the courses are based on entrance and last qualifying exam. Students who have completed class 12/Diploma may apply forTamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) 2025for BE / BTech programmes admission conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai. The application process atMohamed Sathak Engineering Collegeis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutMohamed Sathak Engineering Collegecourse admission2025.

Mohamed Sathak Engineering course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMohamed Sathak Engineering courses:

Mohamed Sathak Engineering College admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Application Process 2025

The application mode is online or offline. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSEC. The application fee is INR 500. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as TANCET, NATA etc for admission to the MTech, BArch among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theMohamed Sathak Engineering College feeto confirm their seats at the college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am really very satisfied.
reviews.review_text: For each subject, they have separate labs to study about that like Physics, Chemistry, Python, English, and other related fields. Classroom is also very good. Hostel is not maintained properly, I didn't like the hostel because it was not hygienic, but the food is in good condition and made hygienically. Only rooms are bad.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied to join this college, except for the hostel.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available inside the campus and in the canteen, which is also inside the campus and provides quality food. They are separate hostels for boys and girls. They are not really worth the hostel because it was an old building.

reviews.review_heading: Well-infrastructure and qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our department has our own lab with good working internet and good atmosphere view of classroom including well benches and fans. Hostel is well furnished place. Food quality in canteen and mess is amazing. Every year, a sports day is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the fee I paid, but I can't vibe around.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very low compared to other colleges in my city. Infrastructure is average, classrooms are nearly maintained, and the library is very good. Wi-Fi is average. The hostel is the worst, but hostel fees are very high. Hostel food is very hygienic, and rooms are well maintained. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I think fee amount is little valuable at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College, Kilakarai.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available in our course is good. There is no network coverage in some of the college places. Library is very large and useful. When it comes to hostel, it has poor infrastructure with poor hostel food. Hostel rooms are not good but average hostel experience.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but no placement.
reviews.review_text: It looks so good about infrastructure, labs are available, classrooms are also okay, but quality staff was not there when I studied. I'm a day scholar, but I had many friends from the hostel. They always told me the food is not good. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The library is available. The food is good. Sports and games are available. Mess food is available for 3times. Milk, tea, and coffee are available in the morning, evening, and night, when all times open in college start from 8.15 to 3.30. Medical facilities are available for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure and attitude of college towards students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi on campus won't be proper. You won't get network inside the classrooms. The hostel available on campus is not good. Since, it was near the coastal area, tap water will be so salty. No proper food is provided nowadays. The college is renovating the old buildings. In college, there is no maintanence of toilets.

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally happy to recommend my college to my cousins, relatives.
reviews.review_text: 24 hour Wi-Fi facility. You can use library for 24 hours. Very excellent lab facility with very good faculty. Separate mess for veg and non veg students with very affordable rate and high quality food. Canteen facility is superb and 24 hour medical facility available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has descent infrastructure and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a good infrastructure as I expected. But it is descent and can be improved. Lab equipment is also decent. The canteen on the campus is the worst. Sports facilities are not provided in college neither there are good opportunities for sportspersons.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and platform to study engineering.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure and classrooms but the labs are too old. The classrooms are developed in this year for improving the admission and quality of study. But hostel rooms are little bad when compared to classrooms. Lastly the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Crowd and campus life is poor, poor bathroom facility, good faculty members,70% placement in 2019.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite bad as the bathrooms are not properly maintained and the taps don't work. The classrooms are white washed and the classrooms are well ventilated. The corridor is moped regularly and good RO facility is available in every corners. The food is canteen and the hostel is average however air contained hostel block is good and well maintained. Only the labs have Wi-Fi, Library is good, sports, game and medical facility is available!

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best for academics, but there is no fun on the campus.
reviews.review_text: During my tenure at the college, the hostel looked like a haunted place. The infrastructure was very poor. But our new principal is renovating that.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mohamed Sathak Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is enabled with Wi-Fi, and the college is in the second position in handball, in the south zone. The college has a well-ventilated library which consists of books written by famous authors. The advanced survey instruments and the total station are available on the campus. The faculty members taught about the total station. I did not face any issue regarding the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to try the placement for the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is not bad. In the marine, the classrooms they are showing has the air-conditioned room, but it will not work forever. Rest of the infrastructure is at the basic level. The students can adjust that environment. Wherever we are using water other than the drinking water, and it is directly fed from the sea, which is disgusting.

college_info.college_name: Nalanda Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Nalanda Institute of Technology admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nalanda Institute of Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Nalanda Institute of Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Nalanda Institute of Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 79,500 to 2,84,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: In our course, there are more placements. Good infrastructure but we need improvement.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed. The highest salary was 5 LPA to 15 LPA. The lowest salary was Rs 30,000 per month. Google and Microsoft were the top companies. 30 to 40% of students got internships. Practicals were compulsory. Attendance was compulsory and regular notes were checked.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our course, more advanced courses were available and provided high-speed Wi-Fi. Maximum books were available in our library and allowed during college time for reading external studies. Hostel was very clean and canteen provided hygienic food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My college is NIT Bhubaneswar.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent students were placed in my batch. The highest package was 9 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies that came to my college were Spikewell, Argusoft, Chetu Inc., TCS, Wipro, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course and hostels was so good at NIT Bhubaneswar. There were separate classrooms and practical rooms for different branches. The hostel facilities were also so good, and the food facilities were nice in the college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were so helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Teachers at Nalanda Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, were well-educated and taught their students well. The course curriculum was relevant and made students industry-ready. The pass percentage at Nalanda Institute of Technology was 99%.

review_summary.college_name: Nalanda Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College has good placement opportunities, decent infrastructure, and an active campus life.

content.Placements: I am pursuing an MCA from Nalanda Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, from 2023-2025. Around 75-80 percent of students get placed with packages ranging from ₹3 LPA to ₹7 LPA, with the average package being ₹4.5-5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini. Major roles offered are software developer, web developer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: MCA department offers smart classrooms, Wi-Fi-enabled labs, and a well-stocked digital library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and 24/7 utilities, while mess food is average and the canteen is better. Basic medical support and good sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor games are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All things are good in our academy.

content.Placements: 80-90% of students were placed in our course. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. The highest is 1.2 lacs. Top recruiting companies are IBM, Amazon, Google, and Microsoft. 30-40% of students got internships from our course in IBM companies in Hyderabad, Bengaluru.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our hostel. The college has good classrooms and a library. The hostel has satisfying things which make students easy in all quality. The college and hostel have good and satisfactory facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In our course, there are more placements. Good infrastructure but we need improvement.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed. The highest salary was 5 LPA to 15 LPA. The lowest salary was Rs 30,000 per month. Google and Microsoft were the top companies. 30 to 40% of students got internships. Practicals were compulsory. Attendance was compulsory and regular notes were checked.
content.Infrastructure: In our course, more advanced courses were available and provided high-speed Wi-Fi. Maximum books were available in our library and allowed during college time for reading external studies. Hostel was very clean and canteen provided hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college is NIT Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: 90 percent students were placed in my batch. The highest package was 9 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies that came to my college were Spikewell, Argusoft, Chetu Inc., TCS, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course and hostels was so good at NIT Bhubaneswar. There were separate classrooms and practical rooms for different branches. The hostel facilities were also so good, and the food facilities were nice in the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers were so helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Teachers at Nalanda Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, were well-educated and taught their students well. The course curriculum was relevant and made students industry-ready. The pass percentage at Nalanda Institute of Technology was 99%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is a very good college. So, I will say come to the college, visit, and then take admission.

content.Placements: In my opinion, my college is so excellent in terms of all things, like placements, courses, packages, hostel, and many more things. First, I will tell about the placement, 70-80% of students secure jobs through campus. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Quotec, Aloepe, and many others. Approximately 50-60% of students doing internships in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: The institute provides well-equipped and comfortable classrooms with proper air conditioning. Each classroom is neat and clean. If I say about the labs, there are civil lab, computer lab, electrical lab, and mechanical lab. All the labs are well-maintained and neat and clean. This institute provides separate hostels for both boys and girls. A 24/7 Wi-Fi facility is available in our hostel, and CCTV cameras are installed. The dining table is neat and clean. The gym is available in our college.

admission_process.title: Nalanda Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Nalanda Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.Nalanda Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and CUET-PG. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 79,500 - 2,84,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

reviews.review_text: In our course, more advanced courses were available and provided high-speed Wi-Fi. Maximum books were available in our library and allowed during college time for reading external studies. Hostel was very clean and canteen provided hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: My college is NIT Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course and hostels was so good at NIT Bhubaneswar. There were separate classrooms and practical rooms for different branches. The hostel facilities were also so good, and the food facilities were nice in the college.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college. So, I will say come to the college, visit, and then take admission.
reviews.review_text: The institute provides well-equipped and comfortable classrooms with proper air conditioning. Each classroom is neat and clean. If I say about the labs, there are civil lab, computer lab, electrical lab, and mechanical lab. All the labs are well-maintained and neat and clean. This institute provides separate hostels for both boys and girls. A 24/7 Wi-Fi facility is available in our hostel, and CCTV cameras are installed. The dining table is neat and clean. The gym is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with Nalanda Institute of Technology, it is awesome and well-developed institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Nalanda Institute of Technology is good for students to study because it is situated in a peaceful area and away from the market. Hostel management and food quality are very good for students. Our college also provides medical facilities and sports and games facilities to students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college. Students should visit the college and then take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The institute provides good and comfortable classrooms with pure air conditioning. Each classroom is neat and clean. Our college provides labs like civil lab, computer lab, electrical lab, and mechanical lab. All the labs are well-maintained, neat, and clean. This institute provides a separate hostel for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi is available in our hostel 24x7. CCTV cameras are fitted in our hostel and dining table and all are near and clean. Gyms are also present in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of very strict rules and a little dissatisfied with the size of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are sufficient classes, and the Wi-Fi is also okay. The quality of the hostel is a little dissatisfying, but the canteen food is quite good. Medical facilities are not much available here. Sports facilities are also quite good because the college provides money for inter-college tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college, so I would say come to the college and then take admission.
reviews.review_text: The institute provides well and comfortable classrooms with pure air conditioning, and each classroom is neat and clean. If I talk about labs, there are civil lab, computer lab, electrical lab, and mechanical lab. All labs are well-maintained, neat, and clean. The institute provides separate hostels for both boys and girls, and Wi-Fi is available in our hostel 24/7. CCTV cameras are fitted in the hostel, and the dining tables are neat and clean. Also, gyms are present in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is great, offering excellent facilities and highly skilled faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the course are good and it provides the best opportunities for everyone. The quality of the hostel is good and all the faculty members are excellent, with good behavior. The hostel is also very nice.

reviews.review_heading: It’s a good college, in my opinion. Students can learn better in this college.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities on this campus, especially the co-curricular activities like Exotica, where all departments compete with each other. All types of labs related to engineering and the library are available. The quality of facilities in our hostel is fine, and all types of food, both veg and non-veg, are available. The hostel also has Wi-Fi, and the medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: If students want to know everything they can come to our college and see, and they will like it.
reviews.review_text: I am a mechanical engineering student. The infrastructure is more developed. All mechanical machines are well-developed and properly working. Campus Wi-Fi is good. Labs are in good condition with proper working type. It provides smart classrooms. The library is good, and every type of book is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college teachers are qualified and knowledgeable. It provided good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities are well-mannered and highly educated. We have good Wi-Fi. Classrooms are comfortable to study. There is a good and big library and many other things. The infrastructure is available in our college. The quality of the food is very tasty in our canteen. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I think the infrastructure should be improved and it doesn't have value for money.
reviews.review_text: Food is very bad for hostelers. There is a fast food center which is better than the canteen food. Students already gave money for food but still, they have to buy given the money for food but still, you have to buy food from outside because you can't eat this kind of food. It is harmful to your body so be serious about your health.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent Academics, Impressive Placements, and World-Class Infrastructure Make Our College.
reviews.review_text: Spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with modern teaching aids like projectors, smart boards, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Clean, spacious, and well-furnished rooms with basic amenities like beds. Well-equipped medical center with a president doctor and nursing staff, providing 24/7 medical care and emergency services. First aid facilities are available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Indus College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. fees_and_eligibility.overview: KIET offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. KIET College Kakinada courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for KIET College Kakinada courses stands around INR 1,00,000 to 2,56,798.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied by this college's infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: They provide a smaller number of companies on campus. And they are also taking regular companies; no other new ones are coming. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. In TCS, HCL, Teach, etc. Data scientist and analyst, cybersecurity, machine learning model, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have labs, ML labs, and AI labs; these are mostly in my college; they promoted this for the next generation. They provide Wi-Fi in labs. When it comes to hostels, this area is not bad. My college is near a forest. So it is affected by mosquitoes. It is a major problem for us.

reviews_list.review_title: Proud to be a student of this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of the students get placed from this course. The highest package around 7lpa and more based on the company norms the lowest is 3.5 LPA in our college. Top MNC like TCs, Accenture, Emphasis many other companies visited this year and many students get placed. 70% of students got internship opportunities in Amazure, savanthis etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and are very good, we have a huge classrooms, library, with good internet. The quality of food is not too good but okay, we have all kind of facilites like medical, sports and games. Canteen contains all kinds of snacks and healthy juices etc.

faqs.answer: KIET has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

review_summary.college_name: KIET Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: B.Tech college life at KIET College.

content.Placements: Placements were good in our college. Our seniors got placed in reputable companies, and placements were provided at a good rate. In my batch, many members were also placed, and our placement guidance cell provided information about every drive and placement opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: I studied in this college as a day scholar. I heard from my friends, who were opposed to the hostel, that the hostels provided good beds and food for the residents. They offered hot water and also AC rooms for those who wanted them. The wardens were also there for the security of the girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my graduation at this college, but the faculty needs to be updated.

content.Placements: Only 20% of students were placed in my course. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Tech Mahindra, Microsoft, and others. About 75% of students secured internships in companies like Microsoft Azure and Amazon Cloud.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are moderate. Hostel facilities are decent, and the food served as good. However, there are no medical facilities available. Regular sports and games are conducted on the college playground, and NCC is also available for participation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by this college's infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: They provide a smaller number of companies on campus. And they are also taking regular companies; no other new ones are coming. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. In TCS, HCL, Teach, etc. Data scientist and analyst, cybersecurity, machine learning model, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have labs, ML labs, and AI labs; these are mostly in my college; they promoted this for the next generation. They provide Wi-Fi in labs. When it comes to hostels, this area is not bad. My college is near a forest. So it is affected by mosquitoes. It is a major problem for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Proud to be a student of this college.

content.Placements: Around 90% of the students get placed from this course. The highest package around 7lpa and more based on the company norms the lowest is 3.5 LPA in our college. Top MNC like TCs, Accenture, Emphasis many other companies visited this year and many students get placed. 70% of students got internship opportunities in Amazure, savanthis etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and are very good, we have a huge classrooms, library, with good internet. The quality of food is not too good but okay, we have all kind of facilites like medical, sports and games. Canteen contains all kinds of snacks and healthy juices etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of KIET.

content.Placements: Many students were placed at our college. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visited our campus. There were no provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were excellent in our college. The environment was very peaceful with Wi-Fi. Our college had wonderful labs and classrooms. There were two central libraries available. The hostel facilities were good but the food served was not tasty. The canteen was good. Medical facilities and sports were excellent.
